signals.headline: Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire Indefinitely | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire Indefinitely | YES | HIGH confidence**

Trump has extended the Iran ceasefire indefinitely, removing geopolitical premium and driving risk-on sentiment across crypto markets.[1] This catalyst, combined with Strategy's $2.54 billion Bitcoin purchase disclosure, has lifted the broader market and supported gains in Ethereum and XRP.[1]

signals.headline: Ethereum Gains 0
signals.raw:
Ethereum Gains 0.7% to $2,390 | YES | HIGH confidence**

Ethereum added 0.7% to $2,390 on April 22, tracking broader risk-on sentiment from the ceasefire extension and institutional crypto inflows.[1] However, ETH remains trapped in its yearlong $1,800-$2,400 consolidation range, requiring a decisive break of the 200-day moving average at $2,650 to participate meaningfully in the Bitcoin-led rally
